text:
Market today: The market's mood is cautious, with AI spending concerns and oil demand shifts being the main drivers. This is relevant as your tech/chip concentration is sensitive to these macro trends.

Your holdings: SOXL is a SELL/TRIM candidate (-24.38% PnL) due to its leveraged nature and current negative status. SPAL is also flagged as SELL/TRIM (-20.64% PnL), also leveraged and volatile.

Watch: Keep an eye on SK Hynix's large U.S. offering, as it directly impacts the chip sector.

Bottom line: Focus on managing your leveraged positions and monitoring chip sector news.
plays: SOXL: Consider trimming or exiting due to SELL status and leveraged decay.
SPAL: Consider trimming or exiting due to SELL status and leveraged decay.
ANET: Watch scanner entry 183.96-183.69, stop 183.07 for a potential new buy if conviction builds.
